Services include general exams, well-child exams, immunizations, care for illness or infections, prenatal care, comprehensive dental services, and counseling and drug and alcohol treatment services. 46314 Timine Way Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members or children of tribal members Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm Email (541) 966-9830 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH TRIBES DENTAL SERVICES KLAMATH TRIBES DENTAL SERVICES NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST NARA NW DENTAL CLINIC YELLOWHAWK TRIBAL HEALTH CENTER YELLOWHAWK TRIBAL HEALTH CENTER
